title: Marty Pincombe
content:
Chief Technology Officer
People.ContactEmail mpincombe@mccarthy.ca
Marty Pincombe is the Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at McCarthy Tétrault and member of the firm’s executive team. Marty brings 25 years experience in consistently driving transformative change with a focus on business growth, innovation, and operational efficiency.
Today, McCarthy Tetrault is known as an industry leader in its strategic approach to technology, including AI. Prior to joining the firm over a decade ago, Marty held key positions in regulated and non-regulated organizations in financial services, professional services, telecom, retail, and government / public service sectors. His portfolio has included technology, operations, PMOs, vendor management, and major projects.
Marty facilitates a high-performance and service focused culture, building strong teams through his deep commitment to leadership, mentorship, and engagement.
Marty holds a Bachelors Degree in Psychology from Western University and a Post Graduate Diploma in Applied Technology.
